commands.review_summary:
The PR removes aggregate count labels from Skills, Plugins, Publishers, and Search, moves Skills and Publishers controls into page headers, preserves active-filter Clear actions, and updates associated styles and regression tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR proposes an intentional visual copy/layout cleanup rather than fixing a failing runtime contract. Current-main source inspection does confirm that the aggregate count copy targeted by the PR is presently rendered.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A maintainer should inspect accessible real-browser proof on the exact head; there is no discrete code defect suitable for an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix: remove skills browse count copy
target.body:
## Summary

- Remove misleading count copy from the public discovery pages:
  - `/skills`: no title count and no loaded/result count copy.
  - `/plugins`: no title count and no result/shown count copy.
  - `/publishers`: no title count, no toolbar `Showing...` copy, and no counts in publisher type tabs.
  - `/search`: no count chips in type tabs and no count badges in grouped result headers.
- Move publisher type/view controls into the `/publishers` page header above search, so they no longer sit as a detached row under the highlight cards.
- Keep real item-level stats in cards and list rows, such as plugin downloads and publisher published/download totals.
- Move the `/skills` List/Grid view toggle into the title row above search, and keep the segmented control compact.
- Keep Clear controls available for active search/filter states.
- Add coverage for skills, plugins, publishers, and search count-copy cases, including paginated browse, publisher control placement, and `0` count responses.

## Verification

- `bun run test src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx --testNamePattern "next-page|non-first|label-only"`
- `bun run test src/__tests__/publishers-route.test.tsx --testNamePattern "count copy"`
- `bun run test src/__tests__/publishers-route.test.tsx --testNamePattern "controls in the page header"`
- `bun run test src/__tests__/search-route.test.tsx --testNamePattern "count chips|inactive tab labels|partial count"`
- `bun run test src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/publishers-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/search-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx src/__tests__/skills-index-load-more.test.tsx`
- `bun run format:check -- src/routes/publishers/index.tsx src/__tests__/publishers-route.test.tsx`
- `bun run format:check -- src/routes/plugins/index.tsx src/routes/publishers/index.tsx src/routes/search.tsx src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/publishers-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/search-route.test.tsx`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- Local Playwright DOM checks at 390x844, 768x1024, and desktop widths for `/plugins`, `/publishers`, and `/search?q=weather`: no horizontal overflow; plugins heading is exactly `Plugins`; publishers heading is exactly `Publishers`; publisher type tabs are `All`, `Orgs`, `Builders`; search type tabs are `All`, `Skills`, `Plugins`; no `.browse-count`, `.search-tab-count`, or `.search-results-section-count` count copy on those audited routes.
- Local Playwright DOM checks for `/publishers` at 390x844, 768x1024, and 2048x900: controls are inside `.browse-page-header`, the lower publishers toolbar is absent when no Clear action is needed, no `Showing...` copy, no count badges, no horizontal overflow.
- `npx --yes impeccable detect src/routes/plugins/index.tsx src/routes/publishers/index.tsx src/routes/search.tsx --json`
- `npx --yes impeccable detect src/routes/publishers/index.tsx --json`

## UI Proof

- Skills screenshots from the earlier pass: `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-no-title-count-mobile.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-no-title-count-tablet.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-no-title-count-desktop.png`, and `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-no-title-count-screenshot-wide.png`.
- Audit screenshots from the count-copy pass: `/tmp/clawhub-count-copy-audit/plugins-390x844.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-count-copy-audit/plugins-768x1024.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-count-copy-audit/plugins-1440x900.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-count-copy-audit/publishers-390x844.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-count-copy-audit/publishers-768x1024.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-count-copy-audit/publishers-1440x900.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-count-copy-audit/search-390x844.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-count-copy-audit/search-768x1024.png`, and `/tmp/clawhub-count-copy-audit/search-1440x900.png`.
- Publisher header-control follow-up screenshots: `/tmp/publishers-header-controls-audit/publishers-390x844.png`, `/tmp/publishers-header-controls-audit/publishers-768x1024.png`, `/tmp/publishers-header-controls-audit/publishers-2048x900.png`, and `/tmp/publishers-header-controls-dark-desktop.png`.

## Notes

- The local browser pass still logs the existing React hydration mismatch for theme attributes on `<html>` (`data-theme*`). It appears on all audited pages and is unrelated to this count-copy/control-placement change.
- The bundled layout audit and Impeccable URL scans timed out waiting for the local app's network idle state, so the rendered UI proof used a DOM-loaded Playwright audit and Impeccable's file-scan fallback.
target.author: jesse-merhi
